description: You are a color designer at an animation studio. The director wants a 'sunset' variation of the character walk cycle. Open the scene file '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz' and modify the character's palette by changing Style #1 (the primary ink/outline color) to a warm Orange (#FF6600). Render at least 20 frames of the animation as a PNG sequence to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/recolor/'. Ensure the palette style itself is modified rather than applying a global effect.
